mission

Tidal Basin

The operation against Black Tusk's principal Washington stronghold that ends with Division Agents recovering the stolen broad-spectrum antivirals.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Narrative role

Tidal Basin closes the first Black Tusk counteroffensive around the antiviral: Agents assault the faction's primary D.C. stronghold and retrieve the stolen supply. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The official story recap identifies Tidal Basin as Black Tusk's main stronghold in Washington, D.C. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Division Agents take down the stronghold and recover the broad-spectrum antivirals. [1]

  • Black Tuskinvolves

  • Black Tusk Siege of Washingtonoccurs during

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
